about: Aim to become a Tasteful Software Engineer
career: Served as a delivery engineer at Alibaba, participating in the construction of internal efficiency platforms, providing front-end solutions for delivery projects externally, and writing code to achieve service fulfillment.
schoolwork: During university, often served as the project team leader, responsible for and participated in the design and front-end development of multiple applications, gaining experience in coordination, planning, and collaborative communication. Passed CET-4 and CET-6. Received school-level scholarships in all academic years.

education.school: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China

experience.company: Alibaba Cloud Southwest Information Technology Co., Ltd.
experience.description: Alibaba Cloud Intelligence - System Engineering Technology Department. Undertook requirement development for the Yunqiao platform internally, and participated in the delivery of projects such as China Nuclear Power Unified R&D Platform and Guiyang Airport Qianyunyigou
Alibaba Cloud Intelligence - Global Technical Services Department. Undertook requirement development for the Eco Partner Workbench of the Global Technical Services Department

Storage Business Infrastructure - Container Platform Group. Refactored and developed CDBI, set up and deployed independent verification environments, wrote deployment scripts, and authored over ten technical documents and blog posts. Awarded as Outstanding Star of Huawei Storage (top 20%)

projects.description: As the front-end lead, participated in the development and maintenance of Yunqiao Workshop and Yunqiao Asset Market, and contributed to the baseline development and customized development of the commercial version. Improved the user experience and optimized the performance of the Domain-Driven Design diagram editor in Yunqiao Workshop

Guiyang Airport delivery project, a collaborative promotional activity platform for automotive and liquor companies. As the front-end lead, completed the development, integration, and launch of the mini-program, and participated in regular iterations and maintenance
Undertook the Mini Program 2.0 version upgrade requirements, fully responsible for the development and integration of the UI front-end, fixed known issues, and optimized user experience

A lightweight task scheduling tool based on AntV X6 that arranges server-side task execution logic via drag-and-drop. Supports multiple execution modes including serial and parallel, supports editing different task nodes such as Shell and Python, and supports validity checking and automatic node arrangement

Participated in the official website upgrade project in collaboration between DAMO Academy and Yunqiao, responsible for the transformation and development of the login/registration module and personal account management module

projects.shortIntro: Online Repair System for Dormitory Network of UESTC
projects.description: Campus network users can submit repair orders online and track order progress. Network management committee maintainers can accept orders, add processing information, and view order operation logs
Use Markdown to write news and blogs, provide navigation links to various services, and better showcase the LUG team. Design inspired by Tsinghua University TUNA Association's official website

A client designed for families of lost elderly and volunteers searching for them. Families can view rescue progress and mark frequently visited locations; volunteers can view team member positions, set search areas, and add notes. Uses Lark for information synchronization and intelligence aggregation

A timetable-driven WeChat Mini Program for collaborative to-do management among college students. After joining a class, students share timetables, course to-do items, and class public affairs with classmates

contributions.description: As a collaborator, developed new features including dark mode, improved mobile page adaptation, fixed community issues, and helped the theme become better. The repository currently has over 1.6k stars on GitHub
Reimplemented the Gitalk component based on React, TypeScript, and Vite, providing a better development experience and adding more features, including automatic folding of long comments
Allows custom templates to convert input Markdown or HTML documents into images that suit your preferences
An Electron application based on EfficientIR that supports finding duplicate image pairs and searching for similar results of a specified image
The Chinese translation of the open-source repository design-patterns-for-humans, for reference when learning design patterns
Responsible for the front-end design of the 'About Us' and 'Sub-venue' pages

awards.name: Alibaba Cloud Certified Professional (ACP) - Cloud Computing
2021 China Collegiate Computing Contest - Network Technology Challenge
2021 China Service Outsourcing Innovation & Entrepreneurship Competition
